privileged_info_summary: All 15 hotels are seeded into demodb with correct names, types, and star ratings that exactly match their expected maintenance priority assignments. CRITICAL priority covers 6 luxury 5-star hotels (Adlon Kempinski, de Crillon, The Savoy, Park Hyatt Tokyo, Four Seasons Sydney, Intercontinental Amsterdam). HIGH priority covers 6 non-luxury 5-star hotels including The Plaza Hotel, Copacabana Palace, and others. STANDARD priority covers 3 hotels with 4-star ratings. The maintenance batch identifier is 'maint_q1_2026' and last inspection year is 2024 for all records. All expected counts and spot-check values are correct.
